name: multi-model-agents
description: AI Agent Swarm Lite: Codex remains the orchestrator; Opus/Claude provides external review, risk analysis, and 0-100 scoring; Gemini tester workflow is removed.

interface.shortDescription: AI Agent Swarm Lite: Codex main control, Opus/Claude external review and scoring, no Gemini tester workflow.
interface.longDescription: AI Agent Swarm Lite is the simplified branch of AI Agent Swarm. Codex keeps planning, authorization, real file changes, real command execution, local project memory, and final decisions. Opus/Claude acts as an external reviewer/scorer and returns evidence-bound findings, risks, scores, and recommended Codex actions. The Gemini tester workflow is intentionally removed.
defaultPrompt: Use AI Agent Swarm Lite for this task: Codex remains the orchestrator and final decision maker; Opus/Claude may be used only for external review and scoring.
